Julia version: 1.12.3

--- PROBE 1: Construction ---
┌ Warning: Assignment to `probe1_pass` in soft scope is ambiguous because a global variable by the same name exists: `probe1_pass` will be treated as a new local. Disambiguate by using `local probe1_pass` to suppress this warning or `global probe1_pass` to assign to the existing global variable.
└ @ ~/Projects/PadeTaylor.jl/external/probes/taylorseries-arb/probe.jl:42
  Taylor1(Arb, 60) => Taylor1{Arb} order=60
  Taylor1([Arb(1), Arb(2), Arb(0.5)], 60) => Taylor1{Arb} order=60
  PASS: Both constructors work; coefficient indexing verified.

--- PROBE 2: Arithmetic ---
┌ Warning: Assignment to `probe2_pass` in soft scope is ambiguous because a global variable by the same name exists: `probe2_pass` will be treated as a new local. Disambiguate by using `local probe2_pass` to suppress this warning or `global probe2_pass` to assign to the existing global variable.
└ @ ~/Projects/PadeTaylor.jl/external/probes/taylorseries-arb/probe.jl:86
  (1+x)^2 via ^2:    1.0 + 2.0 t + 1.0 t² + 𝒪(t⁶¹)
  (1+x)^2 via mult:  1.0 + 2.0 t + 1.0 t² + 𝒪(t⁶¹)
  All 61 coefficients of (1+x)^2 match between the two methods.
  Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division: all executed.

┌ Warning: Assignment to `probe3_pass` in soft scope is ambiguous because a global variable by the same name exists: `probe3_pass` will be treated as a new local. Disambiguate by using `local probe3_pass` to suppress this warning or `global probe3_pass` to assign to the existing global variable.
└ @ ~/Projects/PadeTaylor.jl/external/probes/taylorseries-arb/probe.jl:196

  exp(x) computed, type: Taylor1{Arb}
  exp(x): all 61 coefficients correct (overlap with 1/k!).
  Computing sin(x)...
  sin(x): all 61 coefficients correct.
  Computing cos(x)...
  cos(x): all 61 coefficients correct.
  Computing log(1+x)...
  log(1+x): all 61 coefficients correct.

  Computing exp(x)^2 at order 80...
  Computing exp(2x) at order 80...
  exp(x)^2 and exp(2x) agree on all 81 coefficients at order 80.

--- PROBE 5: Arb precision propagation (256-bit) ---
┌ Warning: Assignment to `probe5_pass` in soft scope is ambiguous because a global variable by the same name exists: `probe5_pass` will be treated as a new local. Disambiguate by using `local probe5_pass` to suppress this warning or `global probe5_pass` to assign to the existing global variable.
└ @ ~/Projects/PadeTaylor.jl/external/probes/taylorseries-arb/probe.jl:292
  Arb precision set to 256 bits.
  exp(x) computed at 256-bit precision.
  Max radius across all exp(x) coefficients: 2.1590421387736112e-78
  Threshold (2^-200): 6.223015277861142e-61
  exp coeff[60] = [1.20178049364932267021937386416586257652800811579212837697174634066971427199e-82 +/- 2.18e-157]
  1/60! (Arb)   = [1.2017804936493226702193738641658625765280081157921283769717463406697142719889e-82 +/- 2.73e-159]
  Overlap: true
  PASS: All radii < 2^-200; precision is genuinely 256-bit.
